titleStmt.title: SII 29.99: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 99. (A.R. No. B. 207 of 1962-63.) RĀJŌLI, ALAMPUR TALUK, MAHABUBNAGAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: A broken slab in front of Rāmēśvarasvāmi temple on the banks of Tuṅgabhadrā (about half-amile from the village).

It states that when Chālukya emperor Bhūlōkamalla [Sōmēśvara III] was ruling over the empire perggaḍe Sūrapayya, the adhikāri [officer-in-charge] of Yaḍanāḍu, made a grant of income from various taxes to the god Sahasralingadēva of Poḷasanūru for offerings to and worship of the god and the repairs of the temple at the instance of mahāpradhāna, maddverggeḍe, bāṇasuverggaḍe, daṇḍanāyaka Śrivatsadēvarasa, the mahāsāmanta of the emperor.

The record after referring to the rule of the emperor begins with an eulogy of this mahāsāmantadhipati. Poḷasanūru is stated to be a datti of Vinaya-Satyāśrayadēva. The 300 Viḷāsinis of Poḷasanūru, situated within Ayije-nādu division are also mentioned. The record also has registered another grant of income from shops, sale of betel leaves and areca, oil-mill etc., of Rājavoḷalu to the god. Rājavoḷalu seems to be the ancient name of the present village Rājōli.
The record is dated in Bhūlōkamalla year II, Naḷa, Chaitra, ba. Monday, Vyatipāta, Vishusaṁkramaṇa corresponding to 1136 A.D., March 23, Monday. [the tithi was probably ba. 4].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī śrī śrī śrī namastuṁga śirastuṁ
ga caṁdra cāmara cāravē . trailōkyanagarāṁbhaṁ mūlastaṁ
bhāya svayaṁbhuvē . svasti samasta bhuvanāśra
ya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja paramēśra paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ sattyā
śraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
matsarvvajña cakravartti bhūlōkamalladēvaravija
yarājya muttarōttarābhivriddhi pravarddhamāna
mācaṁdrārkka tāraṁ saluttamire tatpāda padmōpa
jīvigaḷappa samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahā
sāmaṁtādhipati mahāpracaṁḍa daṁḍanāyakaṁ
vibudhavaradāyakaṁ sujana nuḍidumatteṁna
gōtra pavitraṁ parāṁganā putraṁ turaya rēvaṁtaṁ
vairikritāṁtaṁ sāhasōtuṁganayyana siṁgaṁ
nāmādi samasta prasasti sahitaṁ śrīmanu
mahāpradhānaṁ madverggeḍe bāṇasaverggaḍe
daṁḍanāyakaṁ śrīvatsadēvarasara besadiṁda
yaḍanāḍadhikāri perggeḍe sūrapayyagaḷu śrī
madhbhūlōkamallavarṣada pāṇnoṁdeneya
naḷasaṁvatsarada caitra bahuḷa sōmavāraṁ vitipā
taṁ viśa(śu) saṁkramaṇadaṁdayije nāḍoḷagaṇa .
mūnūrvvaru viḷāsinījanadaṁ poḷasanūra śisahasra
liṁgadēvara nivēdyakkaṁ Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭi
ta jīrṇnōddhārakaṁ sarvvanamasyavāgi naḍevu
ttamippa vinaya satyāśraya dēvara dattiya poḷa
sanūralu kāṇike sādavaruvaṇata(pō)bhōga suṁ
kaveṁbivellavaṁ dēvarige koṭṭarīśāsana mani ṟa śā
sana moṁbīdhammamaṁ bigedu nuḍidavara bāyalu kōṣṭaṁ mū .
rājavoḷala laṁgaḍayalōṁdu saṭṭuga hēṟeṁge Ele 50 Aḍake hēṟeṁge 1(0)
bhaṁḍiyalu jōḷaṁ māna 2 gāṇadalu Eṇne sollage 1 yiṁtī dharmma
manārānuṁ keḍisidavaru gaṁgeya taḍiyalu sāyira kavile
yanaḷida pātakaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harēti vasuṁ
dharāṁ . śaṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 29.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
